mapper.sql: id, member_id, provider, provider_id, union_id, access_token, refresh_token, token_expire, nickname, avatar, extra_data, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_member_social ( member_id, provider, provider_id, union_id, access_token, refresh_token, token_expire, nickname, avatar, extra_data, create_time ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{unionId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{tokenExpire}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{extraData}, NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shop_member_social WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_member_social SET access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, token_expire = #{tokenExpire}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
